sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented for this shmup

special_mechanics.name: Seizer Beam
special_mechanics.description: Players can grab certain enemies and hold them as a shield against enemy fire or launch them against other enemies

special_mechanics.name: Speed Modifiers
special_mechanics.description: Collectible items that increase the ship's speed during gameplay

special_mechanics.name: Weapon System
special_mechanics.description: Three switchable weapons: Red Cannon, Blue Laser, Green Homing missiles. Each can be upgraded via color-matching power-ups

tier_notes: Tier 3: No precise physics parameters available in source material. Zero Wing is a horizontally scrolling shooter, not a platformer, so traditional movement physics (gravity, jump mechanics) do not apply. Game focuses on aircraft/spacecraft controls rather than character physics.
